nasb.text: Your lamb shall be an unblemished male a year old; you may take it from the sheep or from the goats.

esv.text: Your lamb shall be without blemish, a male a year old. You may take it from the sheep or from the goats,

cnv.text: 你們的羊羔要毫無殘疾，一歲以內的公羊；你們可以從綿羊或山羊裡取。

ccb.text: 羊羔必须是毫无残疾、一岁的公绵羊或公山羊。
